textByHashes.9bad6b690ec084966bfe2b5d5d337c4a97af479a: What brings you to these parts, stranger?
textByHashes.b26c5ac5321d5e7bae6edb46429eecb454bd6aba: I suppose it is a little different to the places your type are used to...
textByHashes.2d0aa1e53658b0fc83b52698de3700eb7015302b: This is my humble little hideaway! Plenty of fish around to sustain a man like me, with the help of my trusty cormorant.
textByHashes.fbc162c1046ee27d05cb6453705e6f0e7d665322: Sure she does! I haven't used a rod in years, just send her out to the waters and she takes care of it for me!
textByHashes.6ecfcd98b44e83cc54ace676557779f730a3f2b5: These birds can be a lot of work... I'm not sure you could handle them, let alone to catch a fish!
textByHashes.ebbc86418808ae7045a2a376711abe7d742f2f40: I don't know, I doubt that your type's up to the task...
textByHashes.4af8e4fcb1a111e7428e4de71c93e2ae84f21c7e: But it would be quite the amusing sight. Go on!
textByHashes.60439f616e671c30b49a4cae08bd41d9a4d5b91d: I'll keep an eye on you and make sure you don't have too much trouble with her!
textByHashes.1e52089cae6cbdd7b869f8308526f7c040cabed8: You're going to need to free up your hands first, though. Nothing in or on your hands.
textByHashes.d0b656f1edf3d7d5da9713f4db37ae5c909662a2: No surprises there! Your type never have been cut out for it.
textByHashes.d1b58b1b22d685ec43acc673276efcd8e02a49a2: Oh, this? This is my trusty old fish sack!
textByHashes.89cac153532072b9d5e38d014764a0a305384fd4: Yeah, fish sack! I might sell you one if you've found any of those pearls around here.
textByHashes.4d49ea79c30c7cc7f5dc009d31b0efa9e4ce9175: Now that is a biggun! How she managed to wrangle one like that I'll never know.
textByHashes.24ab15acdda78e8a591cc1ea20d887f6061b92ad: If you don't want it, I could take it off your hands for a few of those pearls!
textByHashes.f47a2a2cfa92e6cada0959a7b6ad9b812654dc47: I'll give you a hundred pearls for it. What do you say?
textByHashes.90e496b8b025fde558b3bcd1c54a98f33367ab9a: Well, let me know if you change your mind.
textByHashes.db2f691e06c9dfe14c33506e7ebd351c0d52fb6c: Ah, it's you. How are you finding things?
textByHashes.f352469b4ea0f1972e5a38909da80f0a4333cb40: Yes, your type do often seem to underestimate it! Are you finished?
textByHashes.76d2dd662cd0e5e7da47913188ca89a605d00892: Just come back and let me know when you get tired!
